subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Blessed Beauty! The letter thou didst address to his honor Mirza Haydar-'Ali was perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی مکتوبی که بجناب آقا میرزا حیدر علی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @law of divorce, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
